impl String { fn len(self): Number { str_len(self) } }
---
Impl(name=_, target="String", cap="_", methods=["len"])
==========
impl String: Clone { fn clone(self): String { self } }
---
Impl(name=_, target="String", cap="Clone", methods=["clone"])
==========
impl MyClone = String: Clone { fn clone(self): String { self } }
---
Impl(name=MyClone, target="String", cap="Clone", methods=["clone"])
==========
impl String { fn len(self): Number { str_len(self) }; fn upper(self): String { to_upper(self) } }
---
Impl(name=_, target="String", cap="_", methods=["len", "upper"])
